response.overview: A family’s quiet evening of unpacking boxes descends into a chilling nightmare when they uncover a mysterious artifact – an ominous relic that reveals itself as a portal to another dimension. As Iris’s husband and children are pulled beyond its shadowy threshold, she is left to confront an abyss alive with whispers and dread – only to discover the malevolent forces lurking within may have been waiting for her all along.
response.title: Inheritance
